sources.title: NASA Appendix F Display Standard
sources.takeaway: Use dedicated always-visible key info, stale-data indicators, clear threshold violations, and explicit command feedback states.
sources.candidate_application: Top truth strip stays persistent; status pills and warning lamps are explicit; action result panel remains visible.

sources.title: NASA Crew Interfaces Vol.2
sources.takeaway: Critical data must be at the right detail level without repetitive navigation, with clear stale/missing cues.
sources.candidate_application: Dense summary-first cards and compressed sections reduce navigation hops while preserving source refs.

sources.title: AWS Builders Library - Operational Visibility Dashboards
sources.takeaway: Put highest-importance metrics at the top, standardize layout conventions, aggregate first then drill down.
sources.candidate_application: Candidate track uses scan-first top band, stronger hierarchy, and scroll-capped detail lists for drilldown.

sources.title: Open MCT About
sources.takeaway: Mission control UI should unify telemetry views in one place and reduce operator context-switching.
sources.candidate_application: All required operator zones remain on one shell with focused grouping for session, transfer, evidence, and actions.

sources.title: Open MCT Plugins Catalog
sources.takeaway: Use compact status widgets and condensed latest-value views while preserving time-bound controls.
sources.candidate_application: Compression style emphasizes condensed value cards and compact lists over long raw text walls.

sources.title: Auterion Mission Control - Monitoring the Flight
sources.takeaway: A top-bar at-a-glance status + highly visible warnings + telemetry panel helps rapid flight-state understanding.
sources.candidate_application: Candidate shell reinforces at-a-glance truth band and keeps warnings visually prominent.

sources.title: INOC NOC Dashboards
sources.takeaway: NOC dashboards must keep low cognitive load while quickly signaling when deeper investigation is needed.
sources.candidate_application: Candidate layout compresses noise and favors anomaly signaling with bounded, readable sections.

notes: Research was used as design direction only. No production-readiness claim is derived from references alone.
